message:
fix: use dependency_type in JSON output for bd compatibility

Add #[serde(rename = "dependency_type")] to IssueWithDependencyMetadata.dep_type
field so JSON output from `br show --json` uses the same field name as `bd`.

This enables scripts using jq to work identically against both bd and br output,
fixing the migration path for users switching from Go bd to Rust br.

Fixes #5

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -134,6 +134,7 @@ pub struct IssueWithDependencyMetadata {
     pub title: String,
     pub status: Status,
     pub priority: Priority,
+    #[serde(rename = "dependency_type")]
     pub dep_type: String,
 }
